purpose: Accept Krisp Webhook API payloads, authenticate them with a shared secret header, normalize transcript-bearing events into the internal transcript-ingest contract, and call memory-api /ingest/transcript.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Krisp Webhook Header Auth credential in n8n
n8n Execute Command node enabled via NODES_EXCLUDE=[]
failureModes: missing or invalid Krisp secret header
non-transcript Krisp event without transcript text
missing stable meeting identity and no fallback title/timestamp
Execute Command node unavailable in target n8n runtime
notes: Use Krisp-derived meeting/conversation identifiers for source_ref when available; otherwise fall back to a timestamped krisp slug.
Transcript text is required for durable ingest. Summary and action items are optional enrichments.
Observed production Krisp transcript payloads nest the meeting object under data.meeting and transcript content under data.content.description.
Append one NDJSON audit record per authenticated webhook event to /home/node/.n8n/krisp-ingest.ndjson with decision, source_ref, title, and failure/ignore reason when applicable.
This workflow is the vendor-specific adapter. The normalized contract remains MEM-05 / memory-api /ingest/transcript.
